marketConsensusEstimate.rationale: Stock has been under pressure with recent downgrades and margin concerns. Options put/call ratio of 0.69 shows bullish bias but short interest increased 26.9%. Recent earnings beat suggests market may be overly pessimistic.

proxySignals.analystRevisions: Mixed - Citigroup upgraded to Buy on March 18, RBC maintained Outperform, but Piper Sandler downgraded to Neutral with $135 target. Recent downgrades citing Hispanic consumer softness
proxySignals.stockDrift: Down 17.4% over 12 months, -0.68% in last 30 days, trading at $152. Stock at 52-week low was $126.45 in November, recovered but still well below $196.91 high
proxySignals.optionsSentiment: Put/call ratio 0.69 indicates bullish sentiment. Historical data shows elevated put activity in some periods but current levels favor calls
proxySignals.shortInterest: Short interest at 7.5M shares (5.4% of float), up 26.9% over 12 months but down 2.8% recently. Days to cover at 4.8 days

myForecast.rationale: Company has beaten 3 of last 4 quarters and recent Q3 beat by 15.9%. Beer margins remain strong at 38% and management cost initiatives should support margins despite revenue headwinds.

expectedMove.rationale: Historical earnings moves average 5-7%. Beat potential with low expectations and oversold conditions suggest upside bias despite margin concerns.

trade.rationale: Risk/reward favors upside with earnings beat potential and stock trading near recent lows. Strong beer portfolio provides defensive characteristics.
